narrative: Hawkish Fed rate bets drive a third weekly loss for gold as USD dominance anchors G10; USD/JPY holds at 161.33 on a 275bp OIS carry advantage while NZD/USD retreats to 0.5738. USD leads G10 (+1.182% avg) vs CAD (-0.897% avg) as the 2.079% spread reflects a strong bilateral theme; gold lower -1.80%; equities +1.08%; DXY steady -0.04%; VIX 16.8. Watch ECB policy divergence signals and the BoJ meeting on July 31.
